title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 23 - 2018: Putting audio books on my iPhone X 256gb

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about setting up his new iPhone X (256GB) to serve as an all-in-one audiobook and podcast device. He explains his large collection of ~1500 audiobooks from LibriVox and Kindle, the process of transferring MP3s via iTunes playlists, and his use of the Natural Reader app to listen to text from his history website. He also mentions accidentally deleting part of his audiobook collection and relying on Carbonite for partial recovery.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Amazon's failure to allow Kindle books to play on iPhone is a huge mistake that will make them obsolete
A 256GB iPhone can finally serve as a complete portable audiobook and media player, replacing dedicated MP3 players
Has collected every history, philosophy, and religion audiobook from LibriVox and considers the collection nearly complete
Worth the $10 purchase; useful for reading his website's text content aloud at adjustable speeds
